title: Contribution
subtitle: Review your current Topes balance and the ledger events recorded from profile completion, resource milestones, bids, claims, gifts, and campaigns.
ledgerInfo: This ledger slice records profile-completion rewards, first resource milestone rewards, bid reserves/refunds, claim settlement transfers, direct gifts between accounts, delayed 24-hour rewards, and campaign airdrop payouts.

what.title: Topes track contribution, not price tags
what.body: Topes are used to recognize participation across needs, resources, settlements, gifts, and campaign outcomes.

earn.title: You earn Topes from actions
earn.body: Profile completion milestones, resource milestones, claim progress, and campaign events can credit your balance.

spend.title: You spend Topes in exchanges
spend.body: Bids, claim settlements, and direct gifts can debit your balance, and related refunds or credits are recorded in the ledger.

tips.title: Use the ledger as your source of truth
tips.body: Every movement is timestamped and categorized so you can understand why your balance changed and where it came from.

opportunities.title: Topes earning opportunities
opportunities.subtitle: Use these actions to earn Topes through profile milestones, resource activity, claims, and campaigns.

items.resourceFirstImage: Add the first image on a resource
items.resourceDefaultTokenAmount: Set a default Topes amount on a resource for the first time
items.resourceAge24h: Keep a resource active for at least 24 hours
items.claimAge24h: Keep a claim active for at least 24 hours
items.campaignAirdrop: Meet campaign eligibility for airdrop payouts

giftForm.title: Send a gift
giftForm.subtitle: Transfer Topes to another account. For now, enter the recipient account id directly.

movements.claim_settlement_debit: You settled a claim on your need
movements.resource_first_default_token_amount_rewa: First default Topes amount set on a resource
